Requires prior G$.approve(address(this), amount)."}},"notice":"Self-contained reward vault for the WordZapper daily word-ladder game         on Celo. Distributes G$ to verified GoodDollar citizens \u2014 one reward         per real human per day. No backend required. G$ is held directly in this contract. Anyone can fund the pool. Sybil resistance comes from GoodDollar's Identity contract (face verification). Score validation is protected by economic triviality: max reward is ~$0.002, not worth exploiting for any verified human. Celo mainnet addresses:   G$:      0x62B8B11039FcfE5aB0C56E502b1C372A3d2a9c7A   Identity:0xC361A6E67822a0EDc17D899227dd9FC50BD62F42","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/WordZapper.sol":"WordZapper"},"evmVersion":"shanghai","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"src/WordZapper.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcfb2b070d170d3297b3ee80099340d1129bd56e037d8d4b6d3eab632d94b4fdb","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e92879f9ebb46659b375f8a627d7e07f14775790d8347d23c099fe323a09e393","dweb:/ipfs/QmUm9TPiDTEhHVxYTCcrGizQqukUtDaBzMxmsSh7tLN4SA"]}},"version":1}

params.score: Final score from the completed puzzle (display only, not validated on-chain)
params.tier: 1 = completed, 2 = fast (<2 min or <8 steps), 3 = optimal path

dailyDistributed(uint256).notice: day → total G$ distributed that day

fundPool(uint256).notice: Anyone can fund the prize pool. Requires prior G$.approve(address(this), amount).
